title: angelica maritima
intro: Angelica maritima, also known as sea angelica, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Angelica maritima include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Angelica maritima can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it can also be used in cooking as a flavoring agent, although caution is advised due to its potential interactions with certain medications.
